creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 248827
RP2040 flash mode (UF2) image

Works for me on 15-CURRENT.  See attachment for the disk image.

Note that this is a fake file system presented by the boot ROM of the RP2040 to facilitate firmware updates.  It cannot be modified; all writes instead upload a new firmware image to the internal flash according to the UF2 protocol.
